_comment_thresholds: chatbot_threshold: complexity score (0-10) at or above which tasks are routed to AI chatbot UI instead of local Ollama. max_local_parallel: max simultaneous workers — aligned with OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1 in run.sh. Router+actor use qwen3:4b (~2.5GB) so two concurrent actor calls fit without touching the planner/analyst 8b slot.
_comment_context: context_sizes: KV-cache window per model. Kept small to reduce unified-memory pressure on 16GB M4. Increase only if tasks require longer context.
_comment_tokens: max_tokens: per-role generation cap. Router/planner only need short structured JSON; actor/analyst need more room.
_comment_chatbot: chatbot_backends: override selectors/URLs per service. Leave empty to use built-in defaults in ai_chatbot_subagent.py.
